---
title: "Vol. 9 - 2025"
subtitle: "MusMat • Brazilian Journal of Music and Mathematics"
---

## Papers
### Unified musical quantum models for tonal attraction
**Peter beim Graben, Thomas Noll**

[Abstract and paper](v9/01-beim-Graben-Noll.qmd)

### Generalized Omnibus Progressions: A Mathematical Formalization of Harmonic Progressions Exhibiting Semitonal Contrary Motion and Tertian Sonorities
**Hayden Pyle**

[Abstract and paper](v9/02-Pyle.qmd)

### A Chord's Third Nature, and How it Models and Generalizes Omnibus Progressions
**Scott Murphy**

[Abstract and paper](v9/03-Murphy.qmd)
